description_long: This is a standard-sized aluminum beer can with a matte light blue exterior. The front of the can features an illustration of a bearded man sitting on a couch, holding a drink, rendered in a minimalist, hand-drawn style. Below the illustration, the words 'STAY IN' and 'STOUT' are printed in a casual, modern font. The top and bottom of the can are metallic gray, with a typical pull tab opening on the top. The sides of the can are mostly plain, with the artwork and text only visible on the front. The can appears unopened and shows no signs of condensation or wear.
description: A matte light blue aluminum beer can with a hand-drawn illustration of a man on a couch and the text 'STAY IN STOUT' on the front.
description_view_0: The can is shown from the back, displaying a plain light blue surface with no visible graphics or text.
description_view_1: A side view of the can, mostly plain light blue, with a partial glimpse of the front illustration and text wrapping around the edge.
description_view_2: The front view reveals the main illustration of a man on a couch and the 'STAY IN STOUT' text, with the pull tab clearly visible on top.
description_view_3: Another side view, showing the light blue surface and a partial edge of the front illustration, with minimal additional detail.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a minimalist, hand-drawn illustration of a man sitting on a couch, with simple linework and muted colors. The typography is casual and modern, with the product name and style printed below the illustration.
